21198.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : This Promised End

26330.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : This Promised End
26330.description: Frank and Lu race against the clock when an undertaker is given only 24 hours to live by two mysterious hitmen.
